div1.entryFree: Reclaim, to subdue, to tame, to make gentle: this arm that hath --ed to your obedience fifty fortresses, H6A III, 4, 5. beauty that the tyrant oft --s shall to my flaming wrath be oil and flax, H6B V, 2, 54. since this same wayward girl is so --ed, Rom. IV, 2, 47. cf. Unreclaimed in Hml. II, 1, 34.
